hooks.template: Can you tell us how to (insert result) in 60 seconds?
hooks.text: Find the hidden fee your bank took on your last China wire. 30 seconds.

hooks.template: This is why doing (insert action) makes you (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This is why trusting your wire receipt makes a business owner lose thousands.

hooks.template: Everyone tells you to (insert action) but nobody actually tells you how to do it. Here is a #-second step-by-step tutorial that you can save.
hooks.text: Everyone says banks hide a fee. Nobody shows you how. 30-second tutorial, save this.

hooks.template: How to turn this into this in X simple steps.
hooks.text: Turn one wire receipt into proof your bank overcharged you. Three simple steps.

hooks.template: They said, “(insert famous cliché or quote)” — that's a lie.
hooks.text: They said your wire fee was forty dollars. That number is a lie.
